add_params.name: groupId
add_params.description: Room list group ID (Guid or id). PS1 reads $RoomListObj.groupId.

add_params.name: AddMember
add_params.description: Array of room email addresses (strings or {value: email} objects) to add.

add_params.name: RemoveMember
add_params.description: Array of room email addresses or objects to remove.

add_params.name: AddOwner
add_params.description: Array of user objects [{value: UPN, addedFields: {id}}] to add as owners.

add_params.name: RemoveOwner
add_params.description: Array of user objects [{value: UPN, addedFields: {id}}] to remove from owners.

add_params.name: allowExternal
add_params.description: Only sent if changed from original value (formatter deletes it if unchanged).

notes: customDataformatter spreads all form values and only removes allowExternal if it equals the originalAllowExternal value (prevents sending an unchanged boolean). All other fields pass through unchanged. PS1 reads $RoomListObj.* directly with the same camelCase field names.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
